mapper.select:
SELECT pq.id, pq.user_id, pq.title, pq.content, pq.created_at, ui.`name` AS userName, ui.images AS userImages FROM party_questions pq LEFT JOIN user_info ui ON (ui.id = pq.user_id) WHERE 1 = 1
AND ui.`name` LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryFrom.userName},'%')
AND pq.title LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryFrom.title},'%')
AND ui.user_id = #{queryFrom.userId}
ORDER BY pq.created_at DESC
